title: Listening - Part 1
description: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best.
instructions: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear. There are two questions for each extract.

extracts.context: You hear two colleagues discussing the upcoming company conference.
extracts.audio_script: MAN: So, about the company conference next week, are we all set for the presentations? || WOMAN: Yes, mostly. I'm just worried about the tech setup. Isn't it a bit too risky to rely on the Wi-Fi there? || MAN: That's a fair point. [1]I think we should have a backup plan in case it goes down.[/1] || WOMAN: Definitely. I already talked to IT, and they're coming up with some solutions. But we'll need to be flexible, I suppose. || MAN: Good thinking. [2]It's also crucial that we rehearse thoroughly this time.[/2]

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: So, about the company conference next week, are we all set for the presentations?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, mostly. I'm just worried about the tech setup. Isn't it a bit too risky to rely on the Wi-Fi there?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's a fair point. I think we should have a backup plan in case it goes down.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Definitely. I already talked to IT, and they're coming up with some solutions. But we'll need to be flexible, I suppose.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good thinking. It's also crucial that we rehearse thoroughly this time.

questions.question: What is the man's main concern about the project?
questions.explanation: B is supported by [1]I think we should have a backup plan in case it goes down.[/1] because he mentions a potential issue with the Wi-Fi.

questions.question: The woman implies that she...

options.A: has already taken steps to address the issue.
options.B: is not very concerned about potential problems.

questions.explanation: A is implied by [2]I already talked to IT, and they're coming up with some solutions.[/2]

extracts.context: You hear a student and a tutor discussing the student's essay.
extracts.audio_script: WOMAN: Your essay is quite fascinating, but there are a few areas where it could be improved. || MAN: Oh, thanks! What do you think needs the most work? || WOMAN: Well, [3]the introduction could be stronger.[/3] It seems a bit vague. How about grounding it with a specific example? || MAN: Ah, I see what you mean. I'll revisit that section. || WOMAN: Great. And don't forget to tighten up your references, [4]they're a bit scattered.[/4] || MAN: Sure, I'll get on that right away.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Your essay is quite fascinating, but there are a few areas where it could be improved.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Oh, thanks! What do you think needs the most work?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Well, the introduction could be stronger. It seems a bit vague. How about grounding it with a specific example?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Ah, I see what you mean. I'll revisit that section.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Great. And don't forget to tighten up your references, they're a bit scattered.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Sure, I'll get on that right away.

questions.question: What does the woman suggest about the introduction?
questions.explanation: C is suggested by [3]the introduction could be stronger. It seems a bit vague.[/3]

questions.question: The student is advised to...
questions.explanation: A is advised based on [4]don't forget to tighten up your references, they're a bit scattered.[/4]

extracts.context: You hear two friends debating whether to join a local sports club.
extracts.audio_script: MAN: Are you still keen on joining the new sports club? || WOMAN: I'm not so sure now. [5]The fees are higher than I expected.[/5] || MAN: True, but think about the benefits. Networking, facilities... and we always said we'd get fitter, right? || WOMAN: Yeah, for sure. But what if we don't have the time to go regularly? That'd be a waste. || MAN: I suppose. [6]But maybe committing financially will motivate us?[/6]

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Are you still keen on joining the new sports club?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I'm not so sure now. The fees are higher than I expected.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: True, but think about the benefits. Networking, facilities... and we always said we'd get fitter, right?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yeah, for sure. But what if we don't have the time to go regularly? That'd be a waste.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I suppose. But maybe committing financially will motivate us?

questions.question: What is the woman's main hesitation about joining the club?
questions.explanation: B is her main concern as evident from [5]The fees are higher than I expected.[/5]

questions.question: Why does the man think they should join the club?

options.A: They have lots of free time.
options.C: A financial commitment might encourage attendance.

questions.explanation: C is implied by [6]maybe committing financially will motivate us?[/6]
